history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The next cell in front of me at row 02 column C contains lava (`L`), which is deadly and must be avoided. I need to change direction to avoid the lava. Looking at the map, I can turn downwards to navigate around the lava. To change from facing right (`>`) to facing down (`v`), I should turn right once.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). Moving forward would take me to row 03 column B, which is a floor cell (`.`), so it is safe. My goal is to reach the goal at row 08 column H. Moving forward is safe and will bring me closer to the goal since I am moving down along the column.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am located at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is located at row 08 column H. If I move forward, I will go to row 04 column B, which is a safe floor cell (`.`). Moving forward is safe and will get me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 04, column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08, column H. Moving forward puts me at row 05, column B which is a safe floor cell (`.`). Continuing downwards seems the best path to eventually reach the goal by moving down then turning right to navigate around the lava cells.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 05 column B and facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward (down) would lead me to cell 06B, which is floor (safe). To progress toward the goal, moving down is appropriate since the goal is below and to the right. So I will move forward first to get closer.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 06, column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08, column H. Moving forward would take me into row 07, column B which is floor (`.`), so it is safe to move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 07 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward would take me into row 08 column B which is a floor (`.`) but not closer to goal horizontally. To move towards the goal I need to orient right (`>`). From facing down (`v`), to face right (`>`), I need to turn left (counter-clockwise).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 07 column B facing right (`>`). My goal is at row 08 column H. Directly moving forward to cell 07 column C is lava (`L`), which is deadly. I need to change direction. If I turn left, I will face up, but moving forward will hit a wall at row 06 column B. If I turn right, I will face down and moving forward to cell 08 column B is safe (`.`). So, I will turn right first to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08 column H. If I move forward, I will enter row 08 column B which is a safe floor cell (`.`). Moving forward is safe and will bring me closer towards the goal which is on the lower rows.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08, column H. The path forward is blocked by a wall at row 09. To reach the goal, I should turn left to face right (`>`), then move forward along row 08 toward the goal. 
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. I need to move right while avoiding lava cells. The next cell in front of me at row 08 column C is lava (`L`). I cannot move forward. I should try to turn either up or down to find a safe path. Turning up will face me to row 07 column B, which is a floor cell. This seems safe to explore.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 08, column B, facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 08, column H. Ahead of me at row 07 column B is a safe floor cell, but continuing straight will lead me to lava on the next columns. To reach the goal on the right side at column H, I need to turn right to face towards the goal and move forward. Since I am facing up and want to face right, I will turn right first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 08 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward will take me through cells C, D, E, F, G to H. However, cells C, E, G are lava cells (`L`), which are deadly. I must avoid moving forward into lava. I see that directly forward is lava at 08C. To avoid lava, I can consider turning up or down. Looking upwards (row 07, column B) is a floor (`.`), so turning up and moving forward north is safe to navigate around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 08, column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 08, column H. To reach it, I need to move towards the right. Since I am facing up, I need to turn right to face right (`>`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 08, column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08, column H. Moving forward will be safe because the next cell at row 08, column C is lava (`L`), so I should not move forward. I need to first turn to avoid the lava and find a way around it. The best action is to turn left to face up and then find a safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 08, column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 08, column H. Moving forward would put me into a lava cell at row 07, column B (`L`), so moving forward is not safe. The best option is to turn right to face right (`>`). That will allow me to move towards the goal along row 08, as those cells seem free.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 08, column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08, column H. Moving forward leads me to column C which contains lava (`L`), so I cannot move forward safely. To reach the goal, I need to avoid the lava in front of me. I should turn left to face up and try to find another path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 08, column H. To reach the goal, I should move right across row 08. However, I am currently facing up. I need to turn right twice (180 degrees) to face right (`>`), then move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08, column H. The path forward to column C is lava (`L`), so I cannot move forward safely. I will need to change my orientation. Turning left will make me face up, turning right will face down. Facing up (row 07, col B) is a floor (safe), so I can turn left to start moving upwards to eventually go around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 08 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Looking ahead (up) from my position, cells contain walls or lava. I cannot move forward without hitting lava in column B. To reach the goal, I need to face right (`>`), which is east towards column H. To change orientation from up to right, I should turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward, the cell at column C is lava (`L`), which is deadly. Therefore, moving forward is not a safe option. I need to turn to find a safe path. Since turning left will face me up towards row 07 column B which is floor (`.`), it seems safe to turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column B facing up (^). To reach the goal at row 08, column H, I need to move right. I am currently facing up, so I need to turn right twice to face right (>) and then move forward. I will start by turning right once.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The path forward to the right has lava cells in columns C, E, and G, but columns D and F in between the lava are empty. Since moving forward one step leads me into lava in column C, I will not move forward. The best option is to turn left to face up and seek an alternate route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 08 column H. I need to move right to reach the goal. Since I am currently facing up, I need to turn right twice to face right (`>`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 08 column B facing right (`>`). The goal `G` is at row 08 column H. Looking forward, the next cell (08 column C) is lava `L`, which I cannot step on. Therefore, I need to change my direction. Turning left will make me face up, but that leads to more lava in column C. Turning right to face down is safe because row 09 column B is a wall `#`. So turning left or right both are not ideal for immediate movement. However, turning right to face down (`v`) will let me explore moving down first and then planning a path around the lava. So I will TURN_RIGHT first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
